DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT.title: Familiar Treat
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT.description: Adds a Feed Familiar option at rest sites. Feeding your familiar gives Familiar Cards [blue]+1[/blue] damage/[gold]Block[/gold] for the rest of this run.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT.flavor: A ration carefully blended for loyal familiars. Definitely not for human consumption.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT_PLUS.title: Familiar Treat+
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT_PLUS.descrip: Adds a Feed Familiar option at rest sites. Feeding your familiar gives Familiar Cards [blue]+2[/blue] damage/[gold]Block[/gold] for the rest of this run.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT_PLUS.flavor: It's just a recolor, but somehow it packs more punch?
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCH_NOTEBOOK.title: Witch's Notebook
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCH_NOTEBOOK.description: The first Elemental Base Incantation you play each turn is free to play.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCH_NOTEBOOK.flavor: An indispensable notebook for an experienced witch.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_SCROLL.title: Magical Scroll
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_SCROLL.description: Increase your [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] maximum to [blue]8[/blue]. At the start of combat, a random Empower-type Incantation in your deck costs {CostReduction} less this combat.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_SCROLL.flavor: It can unlock a witch's true potential.
DMFDWITCHMOD-BLACK_GRIMOIRE.title: Black Grimoire
DMFDWITCHMOD-BLACK_GRIMOIRE.description: [gold]Intelligence[/gold] no longer has any effect, and [gold]Magical Attack[/gold] is disabled. Generated spell cards scale with [gold]Strength[/gold] instead. Whenever you would gain [gold]Intelligence[/gold], gain an equal amount of [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] instead.
DMFDWITCHMOD-BLACK_GRIMOIRE.flavor: Some say this is the legendary Akashic Record.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MYSTIC_MIRROR.title: Mystic Mirror
DMFDWITCHMOD-MYSTIC_MIRROR.description: You cannot gain a [gold]Condense Sigil[/gold]. Homing spells deal {HomingDamageBonus}% more damage. Chaotic Incantation always grants a [gold]Homing Sigil[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-MYSTIC_MIRROR.flavor: Unfortunately, this magic mirror does not talk.
DMFDWITCHMOD-REVITALIZING_ORB.title: Revitalizing Orb
DMFDWITCHMOD-REVITALIZING_ORB.descriptio: Reduce your [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] maximum by {EmpowerMaxReduction}. When obtained, transform all Heal Incantations in your deck into Regen Incantations, preserving upgrades and enchantments.
DMFDWITCHMOD-REVITALIZING_ORB.flavor: Endless restorative magic circulates within the orb.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WEIRD_LANTERN.title: Weird Lantern
DMFDWITCHMOD-WEIRD_LANTERN.description: The first time you [gold]Release[/gold] each turn, you may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]hand[/gold]. If you do, gain {Energy:energyIcons:}. Reduce your [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] maximum by {EmpowerMaxReduction}.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WEIRD_LANTERN.flavor: For some reason, the sight of it makes a question mark pop into your mind.
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURSED_DOLL.title: Cursed Doll
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURSED_DOLL.description: When you apply a [gold]debuff[/gold] to yourself, double its amount. Whenever you gain a [gold]debuff[/gold], gain {IntelligencePower} [gold]Intelligence[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURSED_DOLL.flavor: A little scary, but also a little cute.
DMFDWITCHMOD-POISON_DRAGON_CONTRACT.desc: When [gold]releasing[/gold] a [pink]Heal Sigil[/pink] or [purple]Regen Sigil[/purple], generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-POISON_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flav: An earth-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering healing magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_DRAGON_CONTRACT.title: Wind Dragon Contract
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_DRAGON_CONTRACT.descri: When [gold]releasing[/gold] a [green]Wind Sigil[/green], generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flavor: A wood-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering gale magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_DRAGON_CONTRACT.des: When [gold]releasing[/gold] a [gold]Thunder Sigil[/gold], generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shock[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_DRAGON_CONTRACT.fla: A metal-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering lightning magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.title: Ice Dragon Contract
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.descrip: When [gold]releasing[/gold] an [blue]Ice Sigil[/blue], generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flavor: A water-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering ice magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.title: Fire Dragon Contract
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.descri: When [gold]releasing[/gold] a [red]Fire Sigil[/red], generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flavor: A fire-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering flame magic.
